title: Valentine's Day Disaster
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: On Valentine's Day everything goes wrong until a cowmouse named Cheesy Lou helps Geronimo throw the best party ever! 💝

q.en: Which holiday is this story all about?
q.zh: 这个故事讲的是哪个节日？

explain.en: Geronimo says this tale is all about one of his favorite holidays, Valentine's Day, and he throws a big party each year.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说这个故事讲的是他最喜爱的节日之一——情人节，而且他每年都会办一场盛大的派对。

q.en: In the bathroom rush, what part of Geronimo got sucked into the drain?
q.zh: 在浴室里手忙脚乱时，杰罗尼摩身体的哪个部位被吸进了下水道？

explain.en: After slipping on soap and landing in the tub, Geronimo's tail got sucked into the drain and he had to wrap it in a bandage.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩踩到肥皂滑倒、栽进浴缸后，尾巴被下水道吸住，他只好用绷带把尾巴包了起来。

q.en: Who is Geronimo's number-one enemy who bought the NewsExpress to stop his paper?
q.zh: 谁是杰罗尼摩的头号死敌，她买下新闻快递公司来封杀他的报纸？

explain.en: Sally Ratmousen runs The Daily Rat and brags that she bought the NewsExpress, telling them to stop delivering The Rodent's Gazette.
explain.zh: 莎莉·鼠莫森经营着《老鼠日报》，她得意地说自己买下了新闻快递公司，命令他们停止配送《啮齿动物公报》。

q.en: Which cowmouse from Texas helps Geronimo save his party?
q.zh: 是哪一位来自德克萨斯州的牛仔鼠帮助杰罗尼摩挽救了派对？

explain.en: Cheesy Lou Sweetsnout is a country-singing cowmouse from Texas who tells Geronimo 'Every problem has a solution' and sends 100 horses and cowmice to deliver his paper.
explain.zh: 甜嘴露·甜鼻是一位来自德克萨斯州、唱乡村歌曲的牛仔鼠，她对杰罗尼摩说“每个问题都有解决办法”，还派了一百匹马和一百名牛仔鼠去送报纸。

q.en: At three o'clock, what disaster hit Geronimo at his house?
q.zh: 下午三点，杰罗尼摩在家里遭遇了什么灾难？

explain.en: A wave of foul-smelling water hit Geronimo; the sewer pipe had burst and soaked his whole house.
explain.zh: 一股臭水朝杰罗尼摩扑来——原来是污水管爆裂，把他的整间屋子都泡湿了。

q.en: Who surprised Geronimo dressed as Cupid in a white sheet with a bow and arrow?
q.zh: 谁披着白床单、拿着弓箭，扮成丘比特吓了杰罗尼摩一跳？

explain.en: Cousin Trap leaped out in a white sheet holding a bow and arrow, calling it his Cupid costume.
explain.zh: 表哥特拉普披着白床单、举着弓箭跳出来，说这是他的丘比特 costume（装扮）。

q.en: At seven p.m., who jumped up from behind the sofa to surprise Geronimo?
q.zh: 晚上七点，是谁从沙发背后跳出来给杰罗尼摩惊喜？

explain.en: Hercule Poirat jumped up from behind the sofa saying they were organizing a little surprise for Geronimo.
explain.zh: 赫拉克·波瓦从沙发背后跳起来，说大家正在给杰罗尼摩准备一个小惊喜。

q.en: What heart-shaped food did Cousin Trap make for the party dinner?
q.zh: 表哥特拉普为派对晚餐做了什么心形食物？

explain.en: When Grandfather William complained about pizza, Trap revealed a super-mega-huge pizza shaped like a heart.
explain.zh: 威廉爷爷抱怨怎么没有披萨，特拉普就端出了一个超级巨大的心形披萨。

q.en: At ten p.m., who rode a white horse into the living room as Cheesy Lou's fiancé?
q.zh: 晚上十点，是谁骑着一匹白马冲进客厅，自称是甜嘴露的未婚夫？

explain.en: Toughrat McBeefy, Cheesy Lou's muscular fiancé (also called Little Bull), arrived on a white horse and lassoed himself cake and juice.
explain.zh: 壮鼠·麦克比菲是甜嘴露肌肉发达的未婚夫（也叫“小公牛”），他骑着白马出现，还用套索给自己套了块蛋糕和一杯橙汁。

q.en: At midnight, what did Cousin Trap wish for on his balloon?
q.zh: 午夜时分，表哥特拉普在气球上许了什么愿望？

explain.en: Following Pinky Pick's balloon idea, Trap wrote 'I wish for an endless supply of cheese' before sending it skyward.
explain.zh: 按照平基·皮克的气球点子，特拉普写下“我希望有吃不完的奶酪”，然后让气球飞上了天。
